name: Problem Statement Gate
description: A problem statement describing the user problem being solved must exist before SPEC phase can proceed. Requirements written without a problem statement have no validated purpose and cannot be gate-checked for relevance.

trigger.condition: artifact phase is SPEC or later
trigger.rationale: The problem statement is the foundation of all specification work. Without it the agent cannot validate that requirements are solving a real, agreed problem.

fail_conditions: problem_statement is a known placeholder value

context_schema.problem_statement: string|null — description of the user problem the project solves

resolution_required: Human provides a problem statement that describes: who has the problem, what the problem is, and why it matters

pass.problem_statement: Support agents cannot quickly locate answers during live calls, increasing average handle time and reducing customer satisfaction scores.
